subtitle: Agentic customer readiness and execution cockpit
customer_ask: Need tabbed command center with stakeholder map, timeline confidence, and evidence explainability
objective: Need tabbed command center with stakeholder map, timeline confidence, and evidence explainability

blockers.message: Business readiness is 44/100. Darla needs stronger proof before this can be presented as deployment-ready.
Data readiness is 69/100. Darla needs stronger proof before this can be presented as deployment-ready.
Security readiness is 44/100. Darla needs stronger proof before this can be presented as deployment-ready.

snippets: For enterprise pilots, teams often need on-prem or hybrid deployment options, GPU planning, model endpoint configuration, and a documented vector database strategy.
Agentic workflows can improve the demo story by breaking a vague request into readiness checks, evidence collection, and next-step outputs instead of returning a single chatbot answer.

next_actions: Confirm executive sponsor and measurable pilot KPI.
Frame the first release around one customer workflow with business impact.
Complete a security review before scaling ingestion beyond the pilot corpus.
Lock approved sources and require evidence-backed answers in every demo flow.
Build a two-week POC plan with milestones, blockers, and exit criteria.
Set a review checkpoint for readiness after the first ingestion run.
